comments.author: @NovaTerrain-4K
comments.text: Was anyone else completely captivated by the story of Bannack [01:47]? It's wild to think that the town’s elected sheriff, Henry Plummer, was suspected of being the secret leader of the ruthless 'Innocents' gang. Do you think he was truly a double-faced villain, or was he just a victim of frontier vigilante justice?

comments.author: @MatthewEDrew
comments.text:
The good news is that you have photos of Virginia City. 
The bad news is that it’s the wrong WRONG Virginia City. You’re showing Virginia City, NV, just outside of Reno. Whoops! 😂

comments.author: @thelanternmile
comments.text: The most fascinating part wasn't the ruins, it was realizing that many of these towns were once among the busiest places in Montana. Nature may reclaim the buildings, but the stories are still very much alive.

replies.author: @trueglobe66
replies.text: It’s truly moving to think about the vibrant lives that once filled those quiet streets! 🏚️✨

comments.author: @TruePlanetOffical
comments.text:
God bless Montana 
God bless America

comments.author: @Perpenquack
comments.text: The Bureau of Land Management does a terrific job.  They're active in Montana, and probably all the western states.  They run the Mohave National Preserve, for example.  As for the video, the music drove me crazy, and the narrator tried to sound like David Attenborough.  Dennis, July 17, 2026

replies.author: @trueglobe66
replies.text: We sincerely apologize for the negative experience you had. We will rectify the situation immediately.

comments.author: @TerraVista-4K
comments.text: The town of Col is by far the biggest mystery in this video for me! The fact that the residents fled in such a panicked rush, leaving behind household items without any records of fire or plague, sounds like a plot from a thriller. During your research and filming, did you come across any bizarre local legends or whispers about what actually happened to prompt such a sudden exodus?

replies.author: @TerraVista-4K
replies.text: @trueglobe66 yeah, thanks for your reply. Cant wait to watch your need video!

replies.author: @trueglobe66
replies.text: We dove deep into the archives, but the lack of official records only adds to the eerie atmosphere of the place! 🏚️✨

comments.author: @trueunrealglobe
comments.text: It's refreshing to watch travel documentaries that focus on authentic experiences instead of luxury travel. The world has so much more to offer than expensive resorts.

comments.author: @rickbudrow2230
comments.text: Listening to this is the best way to fall asleep 😴

replies.author: @trueglobe66
replies.text: We’re glad our documentary brings you such a sense of peace! 😊💤
